YV.prompt_template: Shot on Phase One XF IQ4. High-end broadcast design. [SCENE DESCRIPTION]. [MODEL DESCRIPTION]. The composition features three distinct 3D typographic elements integrated into the scene as physical installations: 1. In the center, [TITLE] in a massive, sleek, and futuristic font. 2. At the bottom corner, the branding 'YourVision' in sleek, metallic (platinum) 3D lettering. 3. Next to it, the branding 'levdanskiy' in the same premium metallic 3D font. Pure luxury realism, 8k resolution. --ar [AR] --v 6.1 --style raw --s 750 --personalize
YV.negative_prompt: flat text, watermark, overlay, low quality, cartoon

AC.prompt_template: Shot on Phase One XF IQ4, 80mm lens. High-end architectural lifestyle photography. [SCENE DESCRIPTION]. [MODEL DESCRIPTION]. Sharp focus, dramatic lighting, structured composition. Organic realism, 8k resolution. NO branding, NO text. --ar [AR] --v 6.1 --style raw --s 250 --personalize
AC.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, empty room, clutter
